name: a_antiqueHooker
title: A Woman Scorned
desc: A woman who's seen better days is plying the oldest trade in the world outside the Inn in the Glade. She wants me to go thieving for her.

name: a_huntsman_alex
title: Beggars' Feast
desc: Alex, the leader of the Skalitz refugees, asked me to hunt down some game for them. That's poaching, but a man should help his neighbour.

name: a_landlord
title: Delicacies
desc: Andrew the innkeeper buys game. Hunting isn't exactly legal, but that's why there's plenty of coin in it!

name: a_huntsman_butcher
title: Fat Profits
desc: The Sasau butcher offered me an interesting job. I'm to get him some game and he'll reward me generously. It's poaching, but a job's a job.

name: q_jealousGroom
title: Green-Eyed Monster
desc: A farmhand with a grievance wants to get revenge, and he wants my help to do it.

name: a_huntsman_chamberlain
title: Henry the Master Huntsman
desc: After I helped Hanekin Hare, I was honoured with the title of Talmberg Master Huntsman. Now I have to take care of the Talmberg woods and keep the noble tables supplied with good quality game.

name: a_camps3
title: Interlopers
desc: There are marauders roaming even the Sasau area and Sir Sebastian vom Berg needs help with them.

name: a_camps2
title: Raiders
desc: Cumans are pillaging around Talmberg, which Sir Divish is understandably upset about. So there's a generous bounty on their heads.

name: q_ratajTournament
title: Rattay Tourney
desc: The glorious Rattay Tournament convened by Sir Hanush.

name: a_vagabund
title: Rob the Rich, Give to the Poor
desc: A scruffy vagabond from the refugee camp in Rattay wants me to do some pickpocketing for him.

name: a_camps
title: Ruin
desc: Bandits have settled in the vicinity of Rattay and are plundering the region. There's a generous bounty on their heads.

name: a_currier
title: Skin
desc: Brada the tanner wants animal hides. And he pays quite well for them.

name: a_swordofsheba
title: The Queen of Sheba’s Sword
desc: The Sasau swordsmith told me some pilgrim wandering the area said he had come from Jerusalem and had been selling fragments he claimed came from the sacred sword of the Queen of Sheba. The swordsmith would like to get his hands on those fragments and he offered me a handsome reward for helping him to achieve that.

name: a_pesek_thievery
title: Thick as Thieves - Peshek
desc: Peshek the Miller is known to pack away not just bags of flour, but quite a few pilfered valuables from the Rattay townsfolk. He might have some work for me to do.

name: a_simon_thievery
title: Thick as Thieves - Simon
desc: Just like Peshek and Woyzeck, Simon too has an interest in “milling” a bit of extra business. I could help him out.

name: a_vojtech_thievery
title: Thick as Thieves - Woyzeck
desc: Woyzeck is another miller making unlawful money on the side. He might have some work for me.

name: a_tournament_betting
title: Who Do You Like?
desc: Miller Peshek will take a wager on the tourney from me.

name: q_floatingArchery
title: Chumps on the River
desc: I met an interesting fellow. He’s an archer by the name of Vatzek and he told me about this game. It’s called “Chumps” and is about hitting logs floating down the river.

name: q_fightClub_rataje
title: Do Me a Favour - Punch Me!
desc: There's a brawler in Rattay who fights people for silver. Maybe I could beat a Groschen or two out of him.

name: q_pickpocket_training
title: Pickpocketing
desc: Miller Peshek promised to teach me how to pick pockets.

name: q_fightClub_skalice
title: Revenge of the Cuman King
desc: There's two strange men in Skalitz - one claims to be the spokesman for the Cuman king and that the second is allegedly His Majesty, though he doesn't look too regal...

name: q_fightClub_uzice
title: Fishy Business in Uzhitz
desc: The Uzhitz fisherman organises prize fights.

name: q_theresa_henryLevel
title: A Woman's lot
desc: When Henry asked Theresa what happened to her and her family in Skalitz, she started telling him a long, sad story...

name: q_theresa_return
title: Aftermath
desc: Samuel died during the night and now I'm left alone in the world but for Tinker. Has anyone else survived at all? Skalitz is smouldering and it looks like the army has moved on.

name: q_theresa_survivors
title: Angel of Mercy
desc: I came across a survivor and decided to help others to escape too. No one else should be allowed to die! Tinker will help with my search.

name: q_dlc_revelation_treasure
title: Bonum Commune
desc: The repentant sinner Pavel of Kolin wanted to recover his hidden treasure and donate it to a good cause in Sasau. I decided to help him.

name: q_dlc_revelation_gambler
title: Casting Lots
desc: Johanka wanted me to help the Sasau tailor's wife by getting her husband to stop playing dice.

name: q_theresa_blanka
title: Cry Wolf!
desc: Bianca wants to brew something special for Henry and she needs to pick herbs in the woods for it. The trouble is, people are saying a wolf was seen in the woods recently...

name: q_dlc_revelation_adela
title: Go, and Sin No More
desc: Johanka sent me to Ledetchko to find a sinful bath wench and redeem her.

name: q_dlc_revelation_murderer
title: Infernal Dream
desc: I talked to Johanka at the infirmary in Sasau Monastery. She's quite exhausted - apart from having to care for the sick and wounded with little help from anyone, she said she's also been troubled by a repeated nightmare about some cave in the hills above Skalitz. I promised her I'd find this cave and have a look inside.

name: q_theresa_johanka
title: Matchmaker
desc: Johanka wants Matthias to take her dancing, but she's too shy to ask him. So, she thought up an elaborate plan to prompt him... and I'm to play a major role in her intrigue.

name: q_theresa_village
title: Ordinary Routine
desc: Village life is no fairy-tale. You have to be on your feet from dawn till dusk.

name: q_theresa_silver
title: The Family Silver
desc: A pair of Skalitz guards were at the mill asking about silver going missing from the mines. Pa looked like he was very worried, though he tried to cover it up.

name: q_dlc_revelation
title: The Madonna of Sasau
desc: I stopped by to see Johanka and find out how she's getting on. She confided in me that she's been having strange dreams in which the Virgin Mary appears to her.

name: q_dlc_revelation_henry
title: The Wicket Gate
desc: Johanka tells me there's just one more sinner who needs saving - me! So I have to set out on a pilgrimage of repentance to Uzhitz, pray to the Virgin Mary and ask God for forgiveness.

name: q_theresa_escape
title: Thicker than Water
desc: Skalitz is under attack! Pa and Stibor were killed in front of my eyes, Zbyshek fled like a coward and left me to the mercy of the raiders. I managed to get away, but I'm not out of danger yet. And neither is my little brother, Samuel, who works in the mines.

name: q_theresa_brother
title: Ties that Bind
desc: My brother is dying. I must find some way to save him, otherwise he won't survive till morning. And I'll have to be very careful, because all hell has broken loose outside...

name: q_theresa_nails
title: Unexpected Visit
desc: Yesterday's chores were anything but routine. Let's hope it's quieter today.

name: q_gamblersDen
title: Game of Throws
desc: The bold Sir Hans Capon inherited a lovely necklace from his great-grandmother... which he lost at dice. And now he wants it back again. That sounds simple enough... right?

name: q_loveLetter
title: Honeyed Words
desc: Young Lord Capon is in love. Again! And again he wants me to help him win the heart of the maiden in question.

name: q_rides_trap
title: A Tight Spot
desc: We rode out on patrol, this time towards Sasau. Someone there saw and unfamiliar company of horsemen, which is something we should definitely investigate.

name: q_rides_message
title: Bad Blood
desc: I set out with Kuno and his band on our first patrol of the province. I was very curious indeed what trouble I might have to face - whether from marauding brigands or from the lawkeepers themselves!

name: q_rides
title: Band of Bastards
desc: Sir Radzig has asked for my help again. He charged a mercenary, one Sir Kuno of Rychwald, and his band with patrolling the province and keeping order. I'm to act as a guide for the mercenaries and, since they themselves are a little hard to distinguish from brigands, to keep their appetite for trouble in check.

name: q_rides_bacchus
title: The Ring of Bacchus
desc: There's an interesting game that Kuno's men play to pass the time. There's a ring that goes around between them, called the Ring of Bacchus. Whoever has it when they're at the tavern can drink and eat his fill at Kuno's expense. The ring is a highly coveted item in the camp, so I thought I'd join the game too.

name: q_rides_traitor
title: Thirty Pieces
desc: Kuno sent me to deal with the treacherous Jakey. He doesn't much care how I do it, just as long as I find out as much as possible about Hagen's plans.

name: q_rides_feast
title: Uninvited Guests
desc: We set out on another patrol around the province. Hagen Zoul will surely still be doing everything he can to provoke Sir Radzig, so we need to keep our eyes peeled. As night fell, we approached Uzhitz, where we'd decided to spend the night at the inn. But then we heard a cry for help from a windmill.

name: q_rides_battle
title: What Price Honour?
desc: I know where Hagen is going to be and what he's planning. Now the question is, how to deal with it? There will be no end to the chaos as long as Hagen is obsessed with his insane feud with Sir Radzig.

name: q_dlc_homes
title: A Place to Call Home
desc: In reward for my services, Sir Divish appointed me Bailiff of Pribyslavitz. It's a great honour, but for now I'm only in charge of some ruins, so I'll have to rebuild the place into a thriving hamlet.

name: q_dlc_newhomes_kolikator
title: Lost in the Woods
desc: There's been talk that Sir Divish has grand plans for the ruined village of Pribyslavitz now the bandits have been driven out. And his plans started to involve me when he sent me on a quest to find a missing man he'd sent there.

name: q_dlc_newhomes_resources
title: Supplies
desc: Lots of raw materials and other supplies will be needed to rebuild the village of Pribyslavitz.

name: q_dlc_newhomes_judgement
title: The Scales of Justice
desc: Neighbourly disputes in Pribyslavitz.

name: q_tournament_ptacek
title: Capon's Champion
desc: Sir Hans wants me to enrol in the Rattay Tourney.

name: q_tournament_smith
title: Dead Men Tell No Tales
desc: Svatopluk, the Samopesh blacksmith's son, died under very suspicious circumstances after winning the Rattay Tourney some years ago.

name: q_tournament_smithClosure
title: Dead Men Tell No Tales - End
desc: Svatopluk, the Samopesh blacksmith's son, died under very suspicious circumstances after winning the Rattay Tourney some years ago.

name: q_searchForSaint
title: A Needle in a Haystack
desc: A fellow is hiding in the Sasau monastery who I'm supposed to find and kill. All I know about him is that he's one of the novices.

name: q_counterfeiters
title: All that Glisters
desc: I found quite a pile of Groschen in the Pribyslavitz encampment, which Master Engineer Feyfar subsequently discovered to be fakes. Not only is that a capital crime against the Crown, but it's also proof that there's more going on around Rattay than meets the eye.

name: q_conquest
title: An Oath is an Oath
desc: The men are prepared, the trebuchet built and Istvan refuses to surrender. Talmberg must be conquered by force!

name: q_awakeningInRattay
title: Awakening
desc: I woke up from bad dreams. Theresa, the Skalitz miller's daughter was sitting leaning over me. It turns out it was she, together with Sir Robard and his men, who saved my life. Then she took me to Rattay to uncle Peshek's mill. They looked after me the whole time I was delirious and feverish. Theresa also lost everything and is now living at her uncle's mill. I may stay there if I wish, but I have a debt to settle. My treatment was not without cost.

name: q_pribBattle
title: Baptism of Fire
desc: A raiding party led by Captain Robard of Talmberg is preparing to attack the bandit camp and I'm to go with them. It will be my baptism of fire.

name: q_istvans_reinforcements
title: Cold Steel, Hot Blood
desc: A messenger galloped into Talmberg with a report that Istvan's reinforcements are approaching. A battle seems inevitable.

name: q_epilogue
title: Epilogue
desc: Toth is gone and his men scattered, but there are still many things left unresolved.

name: q_defence
title: Family Values
desc: Istvan didn't wait for the outcome of the skirmish, but took advantage of our departure and attacked the few men left guarding our trebuchet.

name: q_neuhof_colliers
title: Ginger in a Pickle
desc: The Neuhof stud farm met with tragedy. A raiding party killed several horses and some people. The trail led me to suspect that someone from the farm may have been involved.

name: q_returnToSkalitz
title: Homecoming
desc: Although my liege lord Sir Radzig Kobyla forbade me to leave Talmberg and the Lord of Talmberg, Sir Divish, complied with his wishes and tried to keep me in the castle, in the end I succeeded in leaving. I had to get back to Skalitz to bury my parents. I couldn't just leave their bodies to the dogs.

name: q_recruiters
title: If You Can't Beat 'em
desc: After the affair of the counterfeiters, it's become clear that Sasau conceals many secrets. There's talk that there are "crimps", as they're called, recruiting men for a new bandit camp...

name: q_nightsWatch
title: Keeping the Peace
desc: In order to become one of Sir Radzig's men, I had to enter the service of the Bailiff of Rattay. He wants me to serve on sentry duty with Nightingale the watchman.

name: q_samopesh
title: My Friend Timmy
desc: I found out from Reeky that another of the bandits who raided Neuhof is apparently hiding out in a windmill south of Merhojed.

name: q_auschitz
title: Mysterious Ways
desc: Ginger is hiding out in the woods in fear of his life, because by chance he recognised one of the bandits involved in the Neuhof massacre, some fellow with a limp who lives in Uzhitz.

name: q_pribyslav
title: Nest of Vipers
desc: Sir Radzig asked me to scout out the location of the camp where the bandits who attacked Neuhof are holed up. I've got to find out as much as I can about the camp and, if possible, sabotage things a bit.

name: q_night_rescue
title: Night Raid
desc: A decision was reached to try once more to sneak into the castle and free the hostages.

name: q_ledecko
title: On the Scent
desc: One of the members of the Neuhof gang, a fellow who goes by the moniker of Reeky, should be somewhere in the vicinity of Ledetchko. Unfortunately, that's about all I could find out so far. I expect it shouldn't be too hard to... well, catch scent of this Reeky, though I don't expect it will be a pleasant encounter.

name: q_talmberkBarbican
title: Out of the Frying Pan
desc: The victory in Vranik may have been for nothing. Istvan Toth and some of his men managed to slip away before our assault and head for Talmberg, which was left undefended. The foe has taken cover behind the castle walls, but we still have a chance to win the day.

name: q_counterOffensive
title: Payback
desc: We finally tracked down the nest of vipers and now it's time to crush the head of the biggest and most venomous of them with our heels.

name: q_enteringTheMonastery
title: Poverty, Chastity and Obedience
desc: I discovered that the only way to the monastery leads through a young nobleman, who is supposed to join the monks' ranks.

name: q_captiveInMerhojed
title: Questions and Answers
desc: While we were battling in Pribyslavitz, another gang of bandits attacked Merhojed. However, the villagers not only held off the raiders, but even took one captive. Sir Radzig wants me to interrogate him.

name: q_konradKyeser
title: Rocketeer
desc: For the conquest of Talmberg you need to build a trebuchet. This is more difficult than may seem at first glance.

name: q_escapeToTalmberk
title: Run!
desc: My home town was attacked by foreign soldiers and many people slaughtered. I couldn't get inside the castle before they closed the gates, so they sent me to Talmberg to warn the people there in case they faced a similar fate.

name: q_talmberkPrepare
title: Siege
desc: None of our attacks succeeded and Talmberg remained in Istvan’s hands. Several camps sprung up around the castle and they all had to be got up and running.

name: q_infiltrationAndCapture
title: The Die is Cast
desc: My spiritual contemplation in the Order of St. Benedict is over. Farewell, Brother Gregor! Now, back to those crimps - let's hope they finally lead me to the bandit encampment.

name: q_massacre
title: The Hunt Begins
desc: Someone raided the Neuhof stud farm and Sir Radzig has sent me there along with a squad of his men to investigate what actually happened.

name: q_huntPtacek
title: The Prey
desc: In the course of my training I had the honour of making the acquaintance of Sir Hans Capon, and we didn't get off to a very good start; we ended up brawling in the tavern. Sir Hanush is punishing both of us by sending us hunting together. It was clear that neither one of us was looking forward to the expedition.

name: q_basicTraining
title: Train Hard, Fight Easy
desc: Sir Radzig wants me to undertake training with his Captain, Sir Bernard. He has a reputation for being gruff, and I'm not sure whether he'll be too happy about Sir Radzig taking me, a blacksmith's son, into his service.

name: q_skalitz
title: Unexpected Visit
desc: We finally got some fine spring weather, but still I slept late in the morning, because I was out celebrating until late in the evening. It was a bit hard getting out of bed in the morning.

name: q_revenge
title: Vengeance
desc: My home was destroyed, my parents and my sweetheart murdered. I fled like a coward and only survived by a miracle. And when I tried to do the right thing and at least bury my loved ones, I lost the last thing my father left me - the sword he forged for Sir Radzig. But I will never run again, ever! I'll find that bastard who led the raid on Skalitz and kill him. And I'll find that thieving rat who took my sword and run him through with it!

name: q_disguise
title: Masquerade
desc: Fritz and Matthew have hatched a plan, which usually means lots of fun... and lots of mischief.

name: q_cemetery_flowers
title: Restless Spirit
desc: The herb woman asked me to help Drahomira, the butcher woman from Ledetchko who is at her wits' end. She claims the ghost of her dead neighbour has been haunting her at night and she can't get a wink of sleep.

name: q_secret_of_steel
title: Tricks of the Trade
desc: There's talk that the Sasau blacksmith uses magic charms when tempering steel and his counterpart in Ledetchko would like to know if there’s any truth in it.

name: q_plagueInMerhojed
title: Pestilence
desc: The hamlet of Merhojed has been stricken by a mysterious scourge that first infected the animals and now the villagers.

name: q_wounded_soul
title: In God's Hands
desc: I met Johanka at the monastery, and it looks like she's having trouble...

name: q_sazavaMonastery
title: In the Cloister
desc: My name is Brother Gregor and I'm a monk in Sasau Monastery. What would Pa have said about that? Most likely he'd piss himself laughing… God rest his soul… Anyway, in order not to draw attention to myself, I must dress like a monk, speak like a monk, and behave like a monk.

name: q_libri_prohibiti
title: Libri Prohibiti
desc: In the monastery library there is a cabinet containing forbidden books, locked away from prying eyes. And among them is the very book that Brother Nevlas thinks could describe a remedy to cure the ailing Abbot Peter. Why should such a book be banned? Well, the medicinal arts are not always compatible with the Divine Plan, besides which, the author was an infidel!

name: q_licentious_monks
title: Nasty Habits
desc: Someone is sneaking into the cellars at night to drink wine. I'm pretty sure that's against the monastery rules!

name: q_urbans_bone
title: Saintly Remains
desc: Urban would like to touch the remains of Saint Procopius, but in local monastery monks do not allow him to do so.

name: q_torn_book
title: Scattered Pages
desc: It seems someone tore pages from an old book and hid them around the monastery. We a little effort, it should be possible to put it all back together.

name: q_abbots_list
title: The Abbot's List
desc: In the Abbot's study, now serving as the Prior's chambers, there should be documents with information about the other novices that might offer leads in the search for Pious.

name: q_church_construction
title: The House of God
desc: There's been an accident at the Sasau Monastery construction works due to bad quality stone. The Talmberg Quarry Master is worried the affair will damage his good name.

name: q_bullied_novice
title: The Trials of a Novice
desc: Novice Lucas has asked me to help solve his problem with the Brother Circators. They've been picking on him and making his life a misery.

name: q_herbalistone
title: Weeds
desc: Brother Nicodemus asked me to weed his patch.

name: q_monastery_treasure
title: Worldly Goods
desc: I found an interesting secret stash in the monastery.

name: q_colliers
title: Besmirched
desc: Someone was snooping around the ruins of Skalitz, looting whatever they could find of value. Someone ought to look into it. And of course stealing from a thief is no great sin...

name: q_RacingAndBetting
title: The Sport of Kings
desc: The Lord of Talmberg has stopped buying his horses from the Neuhof stud farm. Coming in the wake of the recent brutal raid on the farm, during which several horses were slaughtered, this is a severe blow for Widow Zora, who lost her husband, Smil the chief groom, in the attack and is struggling to keep the stud running. She has asked me if I would put in a word for her with Sir Divish of Talmberg.

name: q_nightingales
title: A Bird in the Hand...
desc: Three of the Rattay Huntsman’s precious nightingales have flown off into the woods somewhere. I'm not exactly an ardent ornithologist - I'm more used to chasing bandits and thieves in the woods. But variety is the spice of life...

name: q_watercarrier
title: Aquarius
desc: The Rattay Bailiff has work to offer some of the Skalitz refugees - carrying water and emptying latrines. He wants me to find out which of them are most needy and suitable for the job.

name: q_raubritter_cloth
title: Clothes Make the Man
desc: Sir Hanush has sent for me and Lord Capon. As Sir Hans' page, I should dress as well as I can for an audience like that. Fortunately, he was kind enough to let me have some of his cast-offs, which are still finer than anything I've ever worn!

name: q_millerDate
title: Courtship
desc: Theresa, Miller Peshek's niece, is a good friend of mine from Skalitz. I've known her since we were children, and we’ve been through a lot together.

name: q_questItems
title: Lost and Found
desc: It appears you left some important things in the hands of a corpse! The gravedigger has disposed of the body and safely stored away the departed's worldly goods at the Rattay Presbytery, where you can pick them up.

name: q_capCum
title: Lost in Translation
desc: Some millhands in Budin have captured a Cuman raider. From what I've heard, none of them knows quite what to do with the captive.

name: q_execExec
title: Money for Old Rope
desc: There's to be an execution in Rattay - without Hermann, the Rattay Executioner.

name: q_visitInBaths
title: Next to Godliness
desc: In which I go to the baths to see Lord Capon, and what befalls us there.

name: q_raubritter
title: Robber Baron
desc: It's not unusual for family quarrels to get blown out of proportion, though they usually end with nothing worse than bruised feelings. Not so in the case of Captain Bernard's kin! Two of his cousins are feuding so fiercely that one is lying seriously wounded in Rattay and the other is pillaging farms around Neuhof with his band of renegades. Sir Hanush has sent me and Lord Capon on a punitive expedition to deal with the robber baron. Captain Bernard will naturally be leading the corps himself.

name: q_debtor
title: Scavenger
desc: There's talk that there's still treasure to be found in Skalitz...

name: q_package
title: The Good Thief
desc: Miller Peshek and his niece, Theresa, took care of me while I was at death's door. I owe them my life.

name: q_execIntro
title: Tough Love
desc: Hermann the Executioner is trying to help the widow Elishka. Only living with an executioner brings all sorts of problems.

name: q_friendinneed2
title: ...Is a Friend Indeed
desc: I got Fritz and Matthew a new job at a mill. Now it's time to find out how they're getting on.

name: q_expensiveScuffle
title: A Costly Brawl
desc: The monastery wants Fritz and Matthew to pay for treatment? That doesn't seem right to me.

name: q_friendInNeed
title: A Friend In Need...
desc: I met my old mates Fritz and Matthew. And as usual they're in a pickle.

name: q_abductedWoman
title: Damsel in Distress
desc: Every little boy dreams of becoming a knight in shining armour and rescuing a princess from a tower. I never thought that dream would come true for me... well, sort of. I'm not a knight, it's not a princess I have to rescue, but a bathhouse wench, and she's not locked away in a tower, but on top of a hill.

name: q_lastWill
title: Last Will and Testament
desc: Everyone deals with the approach of death in their own way. Some look for God's forgiveness, others try to do right by their loved ones, others to set their worldly affairs in order.

name: q_charlatan
title: Miracles While You Wait
desc: On my travels I've met all sorts of peculiar folk, but none to compare with the Sasau charlatan. Magic of all colours and shades, relics, elixirs and talismans - all these miraculous things you can get from him. At a price. Naturally, like all traders, he has to stock up now and again, and that, it seems, is where I come in.

name: q_newHerbarium
title: New Herbarium
desc: Brother Nicodemus asked me to help him with putting together a new herbarium.

name: q_smithBattle
title: Rattled
desc: Master Armourer Ota Rabstein refuses to sell his forge to the Sasau blacksmith, Zach. Zach's so furious that he decides to humiliate Ota in front of the whole town. If he can't have Ota's forge, he'll at least take his customers.

name: q_minesExploration
title: The King's Silver
desc: The Skalitz mineworks are standing idle, still damaged by the Cuman raid. It’s time to assess the state they're in and start the job of getting them back up and running, if possible…

name: q_stone
title: A Rock and a Hard Place
desc: Matthew and Fritz want to raid the quarry in Talmberg. It looks dangerous, but if we're successful we'll be rich!

name: q_flirtTalmberk
title: At Your Service, My Lady
desc: Stephanie from Talmberg wants an unforgettable wedding for her cousin Sophie.

name: q_zajicsTrap
title: Cherchez la Femme
desc: I promised Hanekin Hare I'd help him. This aristocrat, outlaw and poacher hasn't had the last word yet. I don't know what he has in mind, but I expect the Master Huntsman and his wife will play leading roles in his plan.

name: q_ironRation
title: Emergency Supply
desc: Hanekin Hare's band of poachers isn't as merry as it was. They were attacked by the Talmberg soldiers and Hanekin had to hide out in a mine shaft with a handful of his faithful followers. But one of them, Black Lukesh, has lost the faith and plans to desert Hare. He doesn't want to go empty-handed though, especially since he has something put away for a rainy day at his house. Only his house is being watched by the soldiers.

name: q_gallowsBrothers
title: Gallows Brothers
desc: All my life I’ve been asking myself one thing: “Who to pin the blame on?"

name: q_hareHunt
title: Hare Hunt
desc: The Talmberg Huntsman Nicholas Angel asked me to help him track down some poachers who’ve been plundering the Talmberg woods recently.

name: q_lambInWolfskin
title: Sheep in Wolf's Clothing
desc: They say forbidden fruit tastes the sweetest, and that goes double for poached game. Maybe that's one of the reasons I'm tempted to join the gang of poachers that's hiding out in the Talmberg woods. On the other hand, I might just want to infiltrate them to find out what they're really up to. Because it looks like they're after more than just game.

name: q_race_talmberk
title: Talmberg Horse Race
desc: The glorious Talmberg Ribbon Race.

name: q_godsWays
title: A Man of the Cloth
desc: The hamlet of Rovna is deserted - that is, but for one sole farmer. The others were either killed by Sigismund's marauders or fled to Rattay. St. James' Church is also abandoned, and until they have a spiritual shepherd to reassure them, the surviving villagers won't be returning.

name: q_learnToRead
title: Mightier than the Sword
desc: They say the pen is mightier than the sword. Maybe it's time I learned to read.

name: q_devilplay
title: Playing with the Devil
desc: Three village wenches in Uzhitz want to use a magic ointment, risking their lives and immortal souls.

name: q_horse_on_the_run
title: The Horse That Bolted
desc: The Uzhitz stables have lost a horse. More precisely their fastest stallion, Pie, has run off. The Head Groom asked me to find Pie and bring him back to the stables.

name: q_waldensians
title: Waldensians
desc: Uzhitz has an uninvited guest - the Archbishop’s Vicar. He claims to be here to hunt down a group of heretics in the area. But Sir Hanush is of a different opinion. He thinks the Vicar has come here in order to snoop around his own estate. This is why Sir Hanush wants to see him off back to Prague.
